component.name: BlogsApiTask
component.script:
function init() m.top.functionName = "GetBlogs" end function
function GetBlogs() url = m.top.apiUrl if url - invalid or url = "" then print "Invalid API URL" return end if
http = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") http.SetUrl(url) http.setCertificateFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") http.InitClientCertificates() http.addHeader("Content-Type", "application/json") http.addHeader("Accept", "application/json") response = http.GetToString() if response = invalid or response = "" then print "Failed to get response from API" return end if parsed = ParseJson(response) ' if parsed = invalid then ' print "Failed to parse JSON response" ' return ' end if
if parsed <> invalid and parsed.IsArray() then m.top.result = parsed end if end function
